attributes.title: [Redis OTel] Memory & Persistence
attributes.description: Detailed view of Redis memory usage, fragmentation, CPU consumption, and persistence (RDB, fork duration, replication offset).

params.markdown:
## [Redis OTel] Memory & Persistence

This dashboard focuses on Redis resource utilization:
- Memory used vs maxmemory and fragmentation ratio
- CPU time by main thread and background threads
- Fork duration and RDB changes since last save
- Replication offset and backlog

query.esql:
TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.rss IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.rss))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.rss IS NOT NULL
| STATS rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.rss))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.latest_fork IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_us = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.latest_fork))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.latest_fork IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_us = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.latest_fork))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.slaves.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.slaves.connected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.slaves.connected IS NOT NULL
| STATS replicas = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.slaves.connected))

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.rss IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.peak IS NOT NULL OR redis.maxmemory IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used)), mem_rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.rss)), mem_peak = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.peak)), maxmem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.maxmemory)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.rss IS NOT NULL OR redis.memory.peak IS NOT NULL OR redis.maxmemory IS NOT NULL
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used)), mem_rss = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.rss)), mem_peak = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.peak)), maxmem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.maxmemory)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio IS NOT NULL
| STATS frag = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.fragmentation_ratio)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL AND redis.maxmemory IS NOT NULL AND redis.maxmemory > 0
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used)), maxmem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.maxmemory))
| EVAL util_pct = TO_DOUBLE(mem_used) / TO_DOUBLE(maxmem) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 1, _gauge_goal = 0.85

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.memory.used IS NOT NULL AND redis.maxmemory IS NOT NULL AND redis.maxmemory > 0
| STATS mem_used = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.memory.used)), maxmem = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.maxmemory))
| EVAL util_pct = TO_DOUBLE(mem_used) / TO_DOUBLE(maxmem) | EVAL _gauge_min = 0, _gauge_max = 1, _gauge_goal = 0.85

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.cpu.time IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.cpu.time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.state
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.cpu.time IS NOT NULL
| STATS cpu_rate = SUM(RATE(redis.cpu.time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.state
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.latest_fork IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_us = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.latest_fork)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.latest_fork IS NOT NULL
| STATS fork_us = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.latest_fork)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save IS NOT NULL
| STATS changes = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.rdb.changes_since_last_save)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.replication.offset IS NOT NULL OR redis.replication.backlog_first_byte_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS repl_offset = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.replication.offset)), backlog_first = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.replication.backlog_first_byte_offset)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "redisreceiver.otel"
| WHERE redis.replication.offset IS NOT NULL OR redis.replication.backlog_first_byte_offset IS NOT NULL
| STATS repl_offset = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.replication.offset)), backlog_first = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(redis.replication.backlog_first_byte_offset)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC
